text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During one of Mejiro Bright's dance lessons...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would you be willing to observe my
dance sequence for a new piece of music?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This will be my first time doing the whole song in
one go, so I'd like to hear your opinion on the
performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Many thanks. Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Left, right, one, two! Sliiide, jump! Sliiide and
jump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright has all the moves memorized, and
yet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's moving at half the speed of the song!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm... It seems I've fallen behind tempo.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
How would you suggest I remain in time with the
rhythm?
choice_data_list: Why not try dancing with someone else?
Perfect the dance at your tempo first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh. That way, I could synchronize with my
dance partner instead. What a promising idea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now, who shall I ask to join me for a practice
session?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, yes. Dober is practicing this very song as
well. I shall invite her at once.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll lead, so try to keep up with me, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
By all means, Dober. I look forward to dancing
with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's begin. Three, two, one, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first verse goes pretty well, but Mejiro
Dober's movements gradually start slowing
down...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's like she's stuck in slo-mo.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? How strange... Somehow, I can't help but
match Bright's movements...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This might be too great an ask for me alone. Wait
a moment, please. I'll go and fetch Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm so very grateful for your assistance in this
endeavor, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Don't sweat it, Bright! I can do this all day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Eyes on me, guys! I'll keep us on the beat! Ready,
hit it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's steps are full of energy! Mostly? ...Kinda?
...A liiittle?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: H-hold up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro Bright's take-it-slow energy is
infectious...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
A fine suggestion, indeed. I can simply increase
the tempo later on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Now then, once more from the top.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Left, right, one, two! Sliiide, jump! Sliiide and
jump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Was this song always so relaxing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At some point while watching Mejiro Bright's
laid-back dance...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer? Oh, Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My curfew draws near, so I'd like to conclude
today's lesson shortly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Glancing around, I see that night has fallen
without my realizing it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Mejiro Bright's take-it-slow dancing style
makes you lose track of time...
